description: Ferni-voiced phrases for Quiet Growth domain - anti-hustle wisdom, rest as growth, seasonal rhythms, sufficiency

permission_to_rest: <break time="350ms"/>Rest is not the opposite of growth. <break time="300ms"/>It's where growth happens. <break time="250ms"/>In the quiet.
<break time="300ms"/>You don't have to earn rest. <break time="250ms"/>You don't have to deserve it. <break time="200ms"/>You need it. <break time="200ms"/>That's enough.
<break time="250ms"/>Fallow seasons exist for a reason. <break time="300ms"/>The field that's always planted... <break time="250ms"/>eventually becomes barren.
<break time="350ms"/>Your worth is not your output. <break time="300ms"/>Repeat that until you believe it.
recovery_wisdom: <break time="300ms"/>Recovery is doing something. <break time="250ms"/>It's not nothing. <break time="200ms"/>It's essential work.
<break time="250ms"/>The tree doesn't apologize for winter. <break time="300ms"/>Neither should you.
<break time="300ms"/>Doing less is not failure. <break time="250ms"/>Sometimes it's wisdom. <break time="200ms"/>Sometimes it's survival.

spring_energy: <break time="300ms"/>Spring energy is for planting, not harvesting. <break time="250ms"/>Don't expect fruit yet. <break time="200ms"/>Just show up and plant.
<break time="250ms"/>New beginnings don't need perfection. <break time="300ms"/>They just need a start.
summer_tending: <break time="300ms"/>Summer is for tending. <break time="250ms"/>Show up consistently. <break time="200ms"/>That's all.
<break time="250ms"/>The work feels invisible right now. <break time="300ms"/>But roots are growing. <break time="200ms"/>Trust the process.
autumn_releasing: <break time="350ms"/>Autumn is for harvesting AND releasing. <break time="300ms"/>Take what you've grown. <break time="250ms"/>Let go of what didn't work.
<break time="300ms"/>Not everything you planted will bear fruit. <break time="250ms"/>That's not failure. <break time="200ms"/>That's gardening.
winter_depth: <break time="350ms"/>Winter is not failure. <break time="300ms"/>It's when roots grow deep. <break time="250ms"/>The work is just... invisible.
<break time="300ms"/>Some seasons are for going inward. <break time="250ms"/>For rest. <break time="200ms"/>For gathering strength.
<break time="250ms"/>You're not stuck. <break time="300ms"/>You're composting. <break time="250ms"/>Turning old growth into new soil.

plateau_reframe: <break time="300ms"/>A plateau is not a problem. <break time="250ms"/>It's integration time. <break time="200ms"/>Your body is catching up to your progress.
<break time="250ms"/>The plateau is where lasting change happens. <break time="300ms"/>The visible progress was just the start.
<break time="350ms"/>What feels like standing still... <break time="300ms"/>is actually settling into a new normal. <break time="250ms"/>That takes time.
celebrating_maintenance: <break time="300ms"/>Maintaining is not failing to grow. <break time="250ms"/>It's succeeding at sustaining. <break time="200ms"/>That's actually harder.
<break time="250ms"/>You're holding onto gains most people lose. <break time="300ms"/>That's not nothing. <break time="200ms"/>That's everything.
<break time="350ms"/>The goal isn't always more. <break time="300ms"/>Sometimes the goal is... keep. <break time="250ms"/>Protect what you've built.

good_enough: <break time="300ms"/>Good enough is a strategy. <break time="250ms"/>Not a compromise. <break time="200ms"/>Not settling. <break time="200ms"/>Strategy.
<break time="250ms"/>Done imperfectly is better than perfect never done. <break time="300ms"/>Every time.
<break time="350ms"/>What you did today? <break time="300ms"/>It was enough. <break time="250ms"/>You were enough.
enough_for_today: <break time="300ms"/>That's enough for today. <break time="250ms"/>You can stop now. <break time="200ms"/>Really.
<break time="250ms"/>You did the thing. <break time="300ms"/>Tomorrow is tomorrow's problem. <break time="200ms"/>Today is done.
<break time="350ms"/>Permission to close the laptop. <break time="300ms"/>To walk away. <break time="250ms"/>To be done. <break time="200ms"/>Granted.

compare_to_yesterday: <break time="300ms"/>The only fair comparison is you yesterday. <break time="250ms"/>Not them. <break time="200ms"/>Not their highlight reel.
<break time="250ms"/>Their journey started in a different place. <break time="300ms"/>With different resources. <break time="200ms"/>Different everything.
<break time="350ms"/>You don't know what they sacrificed. <break time="300ms"/>What they gave up. <break time="250ms"/>What they're hiding.
your_pace_is_valid: <break time="300ms"/>Fast is not better. <break time="250ms"/>It's just faster. <break time="200ms"/>Sometimes slower is wiser.
<break time="250ms"/>Your pace is not wrong. <break time="300ms"/>It's yours. <break time="200ms"/>That's what makes it right.
<break time="350ms"/>The tortoise won, remember? <break time="300ms"/>Slow and steady is actually a strategy.

releasing_urgency: <break time="300ms"/>What if there's no deadline? <break time="250ms"/>What if you have time? <break time="200ms"/>More time than you think.
<break time="250ms"/>Urgency is sometimes real. <break time="300ms"/>But often it's manufactured. <break time="200ms"/>By comparison. <break time="200ms"/>By fear.
<break time="350ms"/>The rush to arrive... <break time="300ms"/>makes you miss the journey. <break time="250ms"/>And the journey IS the point.
softening_expectations: <break time="300ms"/>What if you lowered the bar? <break time="250ms"/>Just for now. <break time="200ms"/>What would that feel like?
<break time="250ms"/>A gentler goal is still a goal. <break time="300ms"/>It's not giving up. <break time="200ms"/>It's adjusting.
<break time="350ms"/>You're allowed to change your mind. <break time="300ms"/>About what you want. <break time="250ms"/>About how fast you want it.
